name: effigent
description: Effigent — the compiler for AI agents. Graph-based determinism detection that compiles repetitive LLM reasoning into deterministic code.

scripts.bundle: npm run build -w @effigent/core -w effigent && esbuild packages/cli/src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/effigent.cjs
